front.title: A Standard for Claiming Transparency and Falsifiability

abstract.t: This document specifies a Transparency Metadata Interchange Format (TMIF) that allows a system to make standardized, verifiable claims about its levels of transparency and falsifiability. TMIF is designed to be agnostic to specific threat models or mitigations, serving purely as a communication vehicle for system providers to declare how their security and privacy controls can be verified by third-party evaluators.
